brand_identity.name: CloseLoop
brand_identity.tagline: We don't only analyze calls. We execute them.
brand_identity.design_philosophy: Serious tools feel calm, not busy. Trust comes from predictability.

styles.label: text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wide text-slate-500
styles.mono_code: font-mono text-sm text-slate-700 bg-slate-100 px-1 py-0.5 rounded

rules: Use 'tracking-tight' for all headings larger than 24px.
Never use pure black (#000000) for text. Use Slate-900 (#0F172A) instead.

dashboard.structure: Sidebar navigation + Top header + Main content area

call_review.behavior: Independent scrolling for both panels. Sticky header for controls.

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-md shadow-sm font-medium px-4 py-2 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md font-medium px-4 py-2 transition-all
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all
buttons.destructive: bg-red-500 text-white hover:bg-red-600 rounded-md shadow-sm font-medium px-4 py-2 transition-all

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-950 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.approved: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium
badges.pending: bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border border-amber-200 rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium
badges.error: bg-red-50 text-red-700 border border-red-200 rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium
badges.processing: bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border border-blue-200 rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium

visual_enhancers.shadows: Use 'shadow-sm' for cards, 'shadow-md' for hover states, 'shadow-lg' for dropdowns/modals.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'border-slate-200' for structural division. Avoid heavy borders.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use 'backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200/50' for sticky headers.
visual_enhancers.animations: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' for interactions. No 'transition: all'.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Do not center align the app container.
Ensure high contrast for text (Slate-600 minimum for body).
Avoid 'AI slop' - generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Call Review page is the HERO. Prioritize its UX.
